attributes.action: Make the PM answer the questions he is asked at PMQ’s
attributes.additional_details: I want the Speaker of the House to challenge the PM each time he fails to answer a direct question.
attributes.background: During PMQ’s the PM very rarely answers questions with a direct answer from opposition MP’s - the Speaker must start to challenge the PM each time the PM fails to answer. PMQ’s should be a serious occasion but the current PM’s avoidance is having a massive impact on the countries trust.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Introduce standards for answers to PMQs to be enforced by the Speaker
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762566
